assumptions: padding 8.0 g and 1.0 cm per unit/side

copy.title: SuperSonicBrick Insulated Water Bottle 500ml Pack of 3 Matte Black Stainless Steel
bullets: Pack of 3 insulated water bottles, each with a 500 ml capacity for everyday hydration at home, at the gym, or on the go.
Stainless steel construction helps provide durable use, while the insulated design is made to help maintain beverage temperature.
Matte black finish gives each bottle a clean, modern look that works for sports, travel, office, and outdoor activities.
Each single bottle measures 7.0 x 7.0 x 25.0 cm, offering a slim profile that fits easily in bags and many cup holders.
Includes 3 bottles per order with a total package weight of 1009.0 g, making it a convenient multi-pack for families or teams.
copy.description: SuperSonicBrick Insulated Water Bottle 500ml is a pack of 3 stainless steel bottles in matte black. Designed for everyday hydration, each bottle has a 500 ml capacity and a slim 7.0 x 7.0 x 25.0 cm size. Suitable for sports, outdoor use, travel, and daily routines, this multi-pack provides three matching bottles in one order.
copy.search_terms: insulated water bottle stainless steel 500ml matte black pack of 3 sports outdoor hydration travel

a_plus_modules.headline: Stay Hydrated on Every Adventure
a_plus_modules.body: The SuperSonicBrick 500ml insulated water bottle is built from stainless steel with a matte black finish. Compact and portable, it’s designed to fit easily into your daily routine, from workdays to workouts and travel.
a_plus_modules.alt_text: Matte black 500ml stainless steel insulated water bottle in use

image.prompt: Lifestyle product photograph of a Matte Black Stainless Steel Insulated Water Bottle 500ml being used in a bright everyday setting, photorealistic, true to the product's color and material, no text, no watermark.

a_plus_modules.headline: Compact Stainless Steel Insulation
a_plus_modules.body: Made from durable stainless steel, this 500ml bottle offers a sleek matte black look in a convenient size. The insulated design helps support temperature retention while keeping hydration close at hand.
a_plus_modules.alt_text: 500ml matte black stainless steel insulated water bottle close-up
